text: I was charged twice for the same transaction on May 1st, amount 250 euros. I want a refund immediately.
My card was blocked without any explanation while I was traveling in Spain. This is unacceptable.
I never received the investment product disclosure documents before signing. I believe this violates MiFID II regulations.
I want all my personal data deleted from your systems immediately under GDPR Article 17 right to erasure.
The mobile app has been broken for 3 days and I cannot access my account. I need this fixed urgently.
